::: callout
## Learning Objectives

+ Determine what data format is necessary to generate a desired plot or statistical model.
+ Build fluency with and extend data manipulation verbs to get from one rectangular dataset to another.
+ Use helper functions like `across()` and `case_when()` wiht dplyr verbs.
+ Describe the differences between “wide” and “long” format data and how to transition between the two structures.

:::

## Extending Data Manipulation Verbs
